analyst_briefing: STAGFLATION regime holds at HIGH conviction: system_average -0.664 (04-07) corroborated by 3+ SA signals—EU-Mercosur trade pivot (SA), persistent Section 232 metals tariffs (SA), USTR America First agenda (SA)—locking structural input inflation and trade friction under T3 tariff cascade (effective ~15-22%). No regime change warranted; three-indicator test passed, episodic CC probes (e.g., EU overcapacity, episodic_flag true) are TS noise not overriding SA trajectory. Asset classes: 6/8 BEARISH (Energy -0.865, EM Equities -0.869 deepest deviations); Metals/Bonds pressured by tariffs (deviations -0.278/-0.337); Tech bifurcated neutral per weekly vs mild negative baseline (flag_divergence). Blind spots annotated (Bonds systemic crisis, Crypto banking distrust, Tech fiscal expansion) but not suppressed. US vs non-US divergence material: US policy acceleration vs EU/EM stress (insolvencies, Mercosur). Tail risks: USMCA review failure (P=0.35, I=0.8, ERM), EU probe cascade to tech (P=0.25, I=0.7, ESA). Cross-flags: ESA HIGH on fiscal coercion, SCEM/ERM MEDIUM on EM/commodity stress. Oil shock Hormuz driver unresolved. Distinguish: SA structural stagflation intact, no TS over-update.
